title: polygala torrei
intro: Polygala torrei is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. It is a perennial plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough, and soothing sore throats. In traditional herbal preparations, Polygala torrei is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
